Remote migration versions not found in local migrations directory.

Make sure your local git repo is up-to-date. If the error persists, try repairing the migration history table:
supabase migration repair --status reverted 20251128045936 20251201061628 20251201064448 20251202015952 20251203104552 20251204090933 20251204092222 20251205112342 20251205115110 20251205120314 20251210024649 20251210024906 20251210053043 20260105113957 20260130052506 20260211051022 20260222052810 20260401123537 20260403052332 20260403053640 20260403113058 20260405035958 20260409063307 20260409123459 20260410053549 20260413050628 20260414051327 20260414052046 20260414052503 20260414052813 20260414053657 20260414123255 20260415050313 20260415050330 20260415050924 20260415115013 20260416125255 20260417043751 20260417114559 20260417121314 20260418103345 20260419050630 20260419052022 20260419053832 20260419093822 20260419114424 20260420041944 20260420043120 20260420043606 20260420091600 20260420094646 20260420105450 20260420120115 20260420120419 20260420120728 20260421003025 20260421003711 20260421051433 20260422045552 20260422051250 20260422052137 20260422100724 20260422103118 20260422105222 20260422115758 20260426090753 20260426093538 20260426103508 20260427091006 20260429113855 20260430070423 20260503121803 20260504050326 20260504052350 20260505061939 20260505100846 20260505123250 20260506111035 20260506121001 20260506121013 20260506121043 20260506121111 20260506121113 20260506121120 20260507041923 20260507044313 20260507065510 20260507074221 20260508074221 20260508075138 20260508114734 20260508134938 20260508140554 20260508143529 20260508145058 20260508152041 20260509025712 20260509035543 20260509115707 20260509122006 20260509122640 20260510013127 20260510024625 20260511114528 20260511115251 20260512065012 20260512074059 20260512082023 20260512103428 20260513045713 20260513123510 20260513124706 20260513141959 20260513142109 20260513142721 20260514012111 20260514084918 20260516021255 20260516021743 20260516023339 20260516025724 20260516032915 20260516033043 20260516033123 20260516033231 20260516033304 20260516034558

supabase db pull
